description:
Sets reloading '''phase''' on the given weapon's current ammo round.
{{Feature|important|This command does '''not''' change a weapon's (e.g soldier's rifle) ''magazine'' reloading time but changes '''the ammo reloading state''' before the next round is shot.}}
examples: <sqf>_success = _vehicle setWeaponReloadingTime [gunner vehicle player, currentMuzzle gunner vehicle player, 0.5];</sqf>
name: setWeaponReloadingTime

Item.desc: alive and able gunner operating the targeted turret
Item.name: gunner

Item.desc: in range 0..1 where 0: reload complete, 1: reload started
Item.name: reloadTime
